threats: Chain-CC risk (1 hard-CC abilities, ~1.0s of lockdown): Gadget Security Gate (root 1s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
synergy: Little hard CC on your side — you can't force a pick. Play for poke/objectives and punish their cooldowns, don't flip coin-toss 5v5s.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Peekaboo! mark+slow → Knock, Knock! sniper → Back It Up! displacement ult
ourKits.winCondition: land long-range snipes on marked targets and reset on takedowns
ourKits.playWith: engage that holds a target in his sniper line
ourKits.playAgainst: close the gap — he's weak point-blank; dodge the skillshot snipe

ourKits.combo: Bull Rush knockback → Force Shield wall → Shield Slam knockup+stun ult, Shield Bash %hp
ourKits.winCondition: peel the carry with walls/knockups or engage with Shield Slam
ourKits.playWith: a carry he can wall for and peel
ourKits.playAgainst: his Force Shield blocks projectiles — reposition around it; bait Shield Slam

ourKits.combo: Wild Rush charge → Ruthless Assault → Highland Hurl slow → Unstoppable Force cleanse ult
ourKits.winCondition: engage Unstoppable and grind with Hersir-empowered swings
ourKits.passive: Hersir stacks empower the next basic
ourKits.playAgainst: save CC for after Unstoppable Force; kite her charge

ourKits.combo: Ricochet stun → Bad Medicine zone → Infuse heal an ally → Neural Regenesis revive
ourKits.winCondition: keep an ally alive with Infuse + the revive ult and poke with Ricochet
ourKits.playWith: a carry she can pocket-heal and revive
ourKits.playAgainst: she can't heal herself — dive HER; bait the revive before committing

ourKits.combo: Reaping Dash → Hamstring slows → Safeguard spellshield → Earth Shatter execute
ourKits.winCondition: trade with the spellshield up and execute low targets with Earth Shatter
ourKits.passive: permanent power on unique hero takedowns
ourKits.playWith: setup that holds a target for the execute
ourKits.playAgainst: bait Safeguard's spellshield before committing your key CC

enemyKits.combo: Security Gate root → Sticky Mine → Tesla Dome zone ult
enemyKits.winCondition: root with the gate and trap a fight inside the Tesla Dome
enemyKits.passive: FDA stacks grant scaling magical power
enemyKits.playWith: frontline that holds enemies in her Dome
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge the gate; spread vs the Dome — she's immobile, dive her

enemyKits.combo: Stasis Bomb stun → Photon Disruptor slow → Containment Fence wall → Ion Strike slow ult
enemyKits.winCondition: lock a target with stun + fence and let the team collapse
enemyKits.passive: Rocket Boots mobility, refreshed by abilities
enemyKits.playWith: burst that converts her stun/fence into a kill
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge Stasis Bomb; the fence zones — flank around it

enemyKits.combo: Scar mark → Obliterate homing missiles → Reckoning 1v1 realm ult
enemyKits.winCondition: Reckoning a target into the Nether Realm and crit them down 1v1
enemyKits.playWith: a team to clean up if his 1v1 stalls
enemyKits.playAgainst: the ult is a 1v1 — peel the realmed ally can't help, so don't be caught alone; he's crit-reliant early-weak

enemyKits.combo: Pounce → Rumble slow → Boulder Throw → Behemoth ult to brawl
enemyKits.winCondition: engage with Pounce, grow with Behemoth and out-sustain the fight
enemyKits.passive: ramping health regen for jungle sustain
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up damage while he front-lines and CCs
enemyKits.playAgainst: anti-heal and kiting beat his sustain brawl; burst him before Behemoth

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over timeline majors (older film — no tower times; Fang/Prime/Orb only); itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
